title: P0-E operations / process-aware baseline
purpose: Provide a minimal but executable before-and-after baseline for process issue support and operations-pack hardening without turning benchmark scaffolding into a new platform.
update_policy: Only update this manifest when the shipped scope for P0-E changes.
Do not overwrite historical QA evidence; benchmark scaffold records complement docs/04_qa_matrix.md.
Prefer revising seed cases over expanding into a full scoring platform during P0-E.

cases.title: Handoff and owner-gap remediation
cases.description: Operations-heavy review where cross-team handoff, unclear owner, and approval routing create delivery delay.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need an operations review on cross-team handoff friction, unclear ownership, approval bottlenecks, and whether the team should standardize the remediation flow before expanding delivery volume.
source_mix_summary: owner mapping and escalation log excerpt
notes: Should stay useful as the baseline case for deliverable-local process issue support bundles.

cases.title: Capacity and control-gap sequence
cases.description: Operations case where backlog, throughput, and exception handling gaps distort sequencing and growth timing.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need an operations recommendation on backlog pressure, throughput bottlenecks, exception handling, and whether the team should fix control gaps before investing in additional capacity.
